title: AKA Necro Mobs
description: Adds necromancy, undead minions, crime system, blood magic, slavery, cults. Becoming vampire or lich.
body:
# Installation
 Almost essential\
・Recipe mod: You may not understand crafting without it

 Slightly recommended\
・Added pillager buildings: Pillagers will have more corpses, so it's fun\
・Added dungeons: Lots of allies will be added, so it's fun\

# overview
**Things added by this mod**\
・Necromancy\
・Dark Arts\
・A large number of undead minions and enemy mobs (170-180 types)\
・Items including equipment, ores, and plants Around 500\
・Human mobs and corpses\
・Players are given a bounty\
・Bounty hunters attack according to the bounty\
・The player's cult and disciples\
・Dimensions\
・Ritual magic using blood\
・Wine brewing with blood\
・The player becomes a vampire\
・The player becomes Lich\
・Necromancy and botany\
・Build libraries\
・Potions\
・Grimoire\
・Sacrifice\
・Slaves, human farms\
・Grave robbers\
・Baffed undead with staffs\
・Embalming corpses\
・Human meat burgers\

Play Guide(Update：2024_11_27) → [https://mega.nz/file/9NxiHbgD#GT9ugo2iHycf_-gwsta9Ls2ld5WKjf_6ScmlHnJ-Qnc]

The author is not good at English, so he uses Google Translate.

**Someone help me translate the MOD!**

It has not been tested in multiplayer.

It is impossible to use it in PVP at least.

This mod was made with MCREATOR.

# Planned additions
・Adjustments to final boss\
・Corrupted biomes and bosses\
・Expansion of enemy cults

Known bugs↓\
・Crash when trapping cavalry in items from other mods\
・Graphic bug for vampire players (this can be fixed by wearing a vampire hat)

※Notes※\
・Secondary distribution of mods is prohibited.\
・Please download and use mods at your own risk. (Multiplayer not yet tested)\
・Material 「OtoLogic」is used

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

プレイガイド(更新：2024_11_27)→[https://mega.nz/file/1RZxTAKT#ZOPdDof3XuJldnG2YG17ox-i1XzpAJW9jkEi-QdFMxI]

マルチでは動作確認していません。\
少なくともPVPで利用することは不可能です。(プレイヤーから手下へのダメージが通らない)

既知のバグ↓

・騎兵を他MODのアイテムに閉じ込めるとクラッシュ\
・吸血鬼のプレイヤーにグラフィックバグ（ヴァンパイア用の帽子をかぶると収まる）

※注意事項※\
・MODの二次配布は禁止とさせていただきます。\
・MODのダウンロード、使用は自己責任でお願いします。（マルチは動作未確認）\
